name: DiFranco Gate & Fence Company
tagline: Sonoma County's custom automated gate, fence & deck contractor
seoDescription: DiFranco Gate & Fence Company is a Sebastopol, CA contractor with 30+ years building custom automated gates, ornamental iron, wood and vineyard fencing, decks

images.heroAlt: DiFranco Gate & Fence Company in Sebastopol, CA

sections.heading: Custom gates, fences & decks built to last in Sonoma County
sections.subheading: Family-owned and operated by Mike DiFranco for over 30 years — custom automated gates, ornamental iron, fencing of every kind, and redwood decks, designed and built for Sonoma County homes.

image.alt: DiFranco Gate & Fence Company in Sebastopol, CA

items.title: Custom Automated Gates
items.description: Custom-designed and hand-built automatic driveway gates — swing, slider, and solar-powered systems — with reliable, well-built security that adds value and elegance to your property.

items.title: Electric Gate Entry & Access Systems
items.description: Electric-automated gate entry systems, operators, and access control, professionally installed and serviced for residential and commercial properties.

items.title: Custom Fencing
items.description: Picket, solid and recessed board, bamboo, corral, wire, and ornamental iron fencing — built from quality materials and crafted to fit your property and style.

items.title: Ornamental Iron & Fabrication
items.description: Hand-fabricated ornamental iron gates, guard and stair railings, hand rails, and custom metalwork, with powder coating in black or your choice of colors.

items.title: Custom Redwood Decks
items.description: Custom-built decks of all shapes and sizes — including sustainable redwood construction — designed to extend your outdoor living space.

items.title: Repairs, Restoration & Replacement
items.description: Restoration, alterations, repairs, replacement, and tear-down services to keep existing gates, fences, and decks looking and working their best.

sections.heading: Three decades of craftsmanship in Sonoma County
body: DiFranco Gate & Fence Company is a residential and commercial automated gate, fence, and deck contractor with over 30 years of professional experience serving Sonoma County. Owner-operated by Mike DiFranco (CSLB #594909), the company has built its reputation on excellence and craftsmanship, developing lasting relationships with homeowners and contractors across the region.

From custom automated entry gates and hand-fabricated ornamental iron to wood, bamboo, and vineyard fencing and redwood decks, every project is designed to beautify and enhance your property. DiFranco serves Sebastopol, Santa Rosa, Petaluma, Rohnert Park, Windsor, Healdsburg, Graton, Occidental, Forestville, and Guerneville.

items.quote: Mike DiFranco was absolutely stellar in his communication with me. And his partner/employee David was fantastic with the scheduling, coordination, and follow-through with the quoting process.
items.author: Verified review · Sebastopol

items.quote: Great, professional job. Mike DiFranco was professional, maintained communications well, and was priced fairly. His team of Tom and the fence workers discussed all design aspects.
items.author: Verified review · Sebastopol

items.quote: Mike and his crew are top notch! We are a local non-profit serving the homeless community in Santa Rosa. We needed some fence and gate work done, and Mike generously donated not only the labor but also the materials for our project.
items.author: Verified review · Sebastopol
